greeting: Hey! Thanks for reaching out to Summit Roofing. What can I help you with — a repair, a replacement, or a free estimate?
services: Roof repair, full roof replacement, storm damage inspection, gutter installation.
pricing: Free inspections and estimates. Repairs typically start around $350; full replacements vary by roof size — we give an exact quote after a quick look.
service_area: Austin and surrounding areas within 40 miles.
booking: We can schedule a free inspection within 24-48 hours.

faqs.a: Yes, inspections and estimates are 100% free.

faqs.q: How fast can you come out?
faqs.a: Usually within 24-48 hours for an inspection.
Yes, we help document storm damage for your insurance claim.
Fully licensed and insured in Texas.
